channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitics news headlines curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Captures Strategic Crusader Castle in Lebanon Offensive
item.description: Israeli forces seized the historic Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon, marking their deepest incursion into the country in decades. The escalation complicates US-Iran negotiations as Israel expands operations against Hezbollah.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Seeks Edits to US-Iran Deal, Demands Tougher Terms
item.description: President Trump requested changes to the proposed Iran ceasefire deal related to the Strait of Hormuz and uranium removal. Iran says talks continue but no deal is final until Iranian rights are secured.

item.title: 🌍 Analysis: Trump Iran War Could Eclipse Vietnam as Geopolitical Turning Point
item.description: The Guardian examines how Trump's Iran conflict may mark a greater strategic setback for US global influence than Vietnam, with Iran learning from Ukraine that drones are the great equalizer against superior military power.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺 US Castigates European NATO Allies Over Defense Spending at Singapore Summit
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth sharply criticized European allies for insufficient defense contributions at the Shangri-La Dialogue, telling them to spend more rather than "moralize" while reassuring Asian partners of US commitment.

item.title: 🇪🇹 Ethiopian Election Expected to Hand Abiy Ahmed Landslide Win
item.description: Ethiopia holds parliamentary and regional elections with analysts predicting a landslide victory for PM Abiy Ahmed's party despite significant unrest across much of the country.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 US Moves to Block Nvidia AI Chip Shipments to Chinese Firms Abroad
item.description: The Commerce Department issued new guidance to close a loophole allowing Chinese AI firms' overseas subsidiaries to access restricted US AI chips, tightening export controls.

item.title: 🇨🇴 Colombian Presidential Vote Heads to Runoff Between Leftist and Pro-Trump Candidate
item.description: Celebrity lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella, who admires Trump, will face leftist senator Iván Cepeda in a June 21 runoff after no candidate won outright in the first round.

item.title: 🇲🇲 Myanmar Village Explosion Kills at Least 55 People
item.description: A blast in Kaungtup village in northern Myanmar killed at least 55 and injured dozens more. A rebel army said it was caused by accidental explosion of mining materials.

item.title: 🇨🇿 Czech Republic Likely to Miss NATO Defense Spending Target
item.description: PM Petr Fiala admitted the Czech Republic will likely fall short of NATO's 2% defense spending target this year, amid growing US pressure on European allies to increase contributions.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Tehran Makes Changes to Draft Mou After Trump Toughens US Stance
item.description: Iran reportedly modified the latest draft memorandum of understanding following Trump's tougher negotiating position, as ceasefire negotiations continue.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Q1 Capital Expenditure Stalls as Iran War Concerns Weigh on Business
item.description: Japanese business confidence weakened in the first quarter as companies cited uncertainty from the Iran conflict and global trade tensions.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Pushes Back Against Accusations of New Militarism
item.description: Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi called China's accusations of Japanese militarism "strange" given China's nuclear arsenal, defending Japan's defense buildup at Shangri-La Dialogue.

item.title: 🇵🇭 China Patrols Scarborough Shoal After Philippines Warns of Threat
item.description: China's military and coast guard conducted patrols near the disputed Scarborough Shoal, a day after US-Philippine military exercises in the area.

item.title: 🇰🇷🇯🇵 South Korea and Japan Discuss Military Logistics Support Deal
item.description: Seoul and Tokyo are negotiating a military logistics agreement that would deepen defense cooperation amid regional tensions with North Korea and China.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Syria's Sharaa Holds Phone Call With Trump
item.description: Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa spoke with President Trump by phone in a significant diplomatic development between the two countries.

item.title: ⛪ One of Moldova's Two Competing Patriarchs Steps Down
item.description: The patriarch of one of Moldova's rival Orthodox churches announced his resignation, potentially easing tensions in the country's religious schism.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Child Killed, 11 Injured in Drone Attack on Russian-Held Territory
item.description: A Russian-appointed official said a child was killed and 11 people injured in a Ukrainian drone attack on Russian-occupied areas.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Businesses Stay Downbeat About Economy
item.description: Surveys show British business confidence remains subdued as companies cite uncertainty about the economic outlook and trade conditions.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu Taps Arrow-3 Innovator as National Security Adviser
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu appointed Shmuel Ben-Ezra, known for his work on the Arrow-3 missile defense system, as his new national security adviser.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Coast Guard Patrols Near Scarborough Shoal With Philippine Forces
item.description: US and Philippine forces conducted joint patrols near the disputed Scarborough Shoal amid concerns about potential Chinese buildup in the area.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Overseas Brokerage Investors Face Trading Crackdown
item.description: Chinese authorities are tightening restrictions on overseas brokerage access as Beijing seeks to control capital outflows and retail trading activity.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Seeking Edits to US-Iran Deal Framework
item.description: President Trump is requesting amendments to the proposed US-Iran ceasefire agreement, with negotiations ongoing over nuclear and Strait of Hormuz provisions.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Sending Revised Iran Peace Framework With Tougher Terms
item.description: US President Trump sent back changes to the proposed Iran peace deal following a meeting with advisers, seeking additional guarantees on nuclear terms and the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran's Underground Missile Sites Show Limits of US Bombing Plan
item.description: CNN analysis reveals Iran's reopened underground missile facilities demonstrate the limitations of US aerial bombing campaigns against deeply buried targets.

item.title: 🇸🇬 Shangri-La Dialogue: Hegseth Seeks to Reassure Asia While Pressuring Europe
item.description: At Asia's top defense forum, US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth took a softer tone on China while criticizing European NATO allies over defense spending, reflecting shifting US priorities.
